goalType.Name: goalType
goalType.Description: Track bar progress using Money donated or Points

valuePrefix.Name: valuePrefix
valuePrefix.Description: Prefix for the values, such as USD

valueSuffix.Name: valueSuffix
valueSuffix.Description: Suffix for the values, such as Pts

formatWithCommas.Name: formatWithCommas
formatWithCommas.Description: Display numbers with a well formatted comma

showDecimalsForMoney.Name: showDecimalsForMoney
showDecimalsForMoney.Description: Show fractional amounts (only applies if Money)

overrideMax.Name: overrideMax
overrideMax.Description: If true, overrides the max goal with the override below

maxGoalOverride.Name: maxGoalOverride
maxGoalOverride.Description: Override the max value to untie it from highest Goal

overrideGoalText.Name: overrideGoalText
overrideGoalText.Description: If true, overrides the text inside the bar. If false, uses your next upcoming goal

goalTextOverride.Name: goalTextOverride
goalTextOverride.Description: Text to override the goal bar with
